settings.title: Volcano & Hot Springs Hike
settings.summary: Climb the still-smoking crater of Nea Kameni, then swim in the iron-rich hot springs below.
settings.description:
A short boat transfer drops us on Nea Kameni, the young volcanic islet at the heart of the caldera. With a geologist guide we follow the crater trail across black lava fields, past steaming fumaroles, to the rim of the most recently active vent.

Back at sea level we slip into the ochre hot springs — a pocket of warm, mineral water tucked against the cliff — before sailing back to port.
settings.itinerary:
09:00 · Transfer | Boat from the old port to Nea Kameni
09:30 · Crater trail | Guided hike across the lava fields
11:00 · Hot springs | Swim in the warm volcanic bay
12:30 · Return | Sail back to Fira
settings.rates_note: Sturdy shoes required. Park entry fee included. Minimum 2 guests to confirm.
settings.seo_description: A guided hike across the Nea Kameni crater with a swim in Santorini's volcanic hot springs.
